prompt: Ultra-photorealistic cinematic fashion editorial featuring Cristiano Ronaldo, preserving his recognizable facial features, athletic muscular physique, sharp haircut and confident presence. He wears black rectangular luxury sunglasses and a retro-inspired deep burgundy Portugal football jersey with dark green collar and sleeve trim, subtle tonal fabric pattern, fine gold piping, Portugal crest and gold number 7, paired with relaxed dark green wide-leg trousers, premium white sneakers with green stripes, and a luxury wristwatch. Create a two-shot campaign series with strong visual consistency. Shot 1: dramatic ultra-wide low-angle city portrait on a modern skyscraper plaza under a clear blue sky; Cristiano Ronaldo crouches close to the camera with one knee raised, extending one open hand dramatically toward the lens, exaggerated perspective and slight fisheye distortion making the hand appear larger, towering glass skyscrapers converging around him, hard midday sunlight, crisp architectural shadows, bold sports-fashion energy. Shot 2: luxury indoor portrait in a dark burgundy football heritage lounge with rich wood wall panels, thin gold detailing, trophy displays and a deep leather sofa; Cristiano Ronaldo stands confidently with both hands in his trouser pockets, body slightly angled, looking off-camera, warm directional studio lighting sculpting his face and arms, sophisticated premium campaign atmosphere. High-end football fashion campaign, realistic skin pores and fabric texture, accurate anatomy and hands, sharp jersey details, dramatic editorial composition, Leica photography, 24mm wide-angle lens for outdoor shot, 50mm lens for indoor portrait, HDR, cinematic color grading, ultra-detailed, 8K, no watermark, vertical 4:5.
